query: How does COTRN00C handle transaction inquiry?

results.name: RECEIVE-TRNLST-SCREEN
results.preamble:
File: COTRN00C.cbl
Program: COTRN00C - CICS COBOL Program - List Transactions from TRANSACT file
Paragraph: RECEIVE-TRNLST-SCREEN (lines 554-566)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COTRN00, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
results.summary: paragraph RECEIVE-TRNLST-SCREEN in COTRN00C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COTRN00, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
RECEIVE-TRNLST-SCREEN.

           EXEC CICS RECEIVE
                     MAP('COTRN0A')
                     MAPSET('COTRN00')
                     INTO(COTRN0AI)
                     RESP(WS-RESP-CD)
                     RESP2(WS-REAS-CD)
           END-EXEC.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      POPULATE-HEADER-INFO
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: SEND-TRNLST-SCREEN
results.preamble:
File: COTRN00C.cbl
Program: COTRN00C - CICS COBOL Program - List Transactions from TRANSACT file
Paragraph: SEND-TRNLST-SCREEN (lines 527-553)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COTRN00, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
Calls: PERFORM POPULATE-HEADER-INFO
results.summary: paragraph SEND-TRNLST-SCREEN in COTRN00C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COTRN00, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM POPULATE-HEADER-INFO. comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
SEND-TRNLST-SCREEN.

           PERFORM POPULATE-HEADER-INFO

           MOVE WS-MESSAGE TO ERRMSGO OF COTRN0AO

           IF SEND-ERASE-YES
               EXEC CICS SEND
                         MAP('COTRN0A')
                         MAPSET('COTRN00')
                         FROM(COTRN0AO)
                         ERASE
                         CURSOR
               END-EXEC
           ELSE
               EXEC CICS SEND
                         MAP('COTRN0A')
                         MAPSET('COTRN00')
                         FROM(COTRN0AO)
      *                  ERASE
                         CURSOR
               END-EXEC
           END-IF.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      RECEIVE-TRNLST-SCREEN
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: POPULATE-TRAN-DATA
results.preamble:
File: COTRN00C.cbl
Program: COTRN00C - CICS COBOL Program - List Transactions from TRANSACT file
Paragraph: POPULATE-TRAN-DATA (lines 381-449)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COTRN00, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
results.summary: paragraph POPULATE-TRAN-DATA in COTRN00C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COTRN00, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
POPULATE-TRAN-DATA.

           MOVE TRAN-AMT                  TO WS-TRAN-AMT
           MOVE TRAN-ORIG-TS              TO WS-TIMESTAMP
           MOVE WS-TIMESTAMP-DT-YYYY(3:2) TO WS-CURDATE-YY
           MOVE WS-TIMESTAMP-DT-MM        TO WS-CURDATE-MM
           MOVE WS-TIMESTAMP-DT-DD        TO WS-CURDATE-DD
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-MM-DD-YY       TO WS-TRAN-DATE

           EVALUATE WS-IDX
               WHEN 1
                   MOVE TRAN-ID    TO TRNID01I OF COTRN0AI
                                         CDEMO-CT00-TRNID-FIRST
                   MOVE WS-TRAN-DATE TO TDATE01I OF COTRN0AI
                   MOVE TRAN-DESC TO TDESC01I OF COTRN0AI
                   MOVE WS-TRAN-AMT  TO TAMT001I OF COTRN0AI
               WHEN 2
                   MOVE TRAN-ID    TO TRNID02I OF COTRN0AI
                   MOVE WS-TRAN-DATE TO TDATE02I OF COTRN0AI
                   MOVE TRAN-DESC TO TDESC02I OF COTRN0AI
                   MOVE WS-TRAN-AMT  TO TAMT002I OF COTRN0AI
               WHEN 3
                   MOVE TRAN-ID    TO TRNID03I OF COTRN0AI
                   MOVE WS-TRAN-DATE TO TDATE03I OF COTRN0AI
                   MOVE TRAN-DESC TO TDESC03I OF COTRN0AI
                   MOVE WS-TRAN-AMT  TO TAMT003I OF COTRN0AI
               WHEN 4
                   MOVE TRAN-ID    TO TRNID04I OF COTRN0AI
                   MOVE WS-TRAN-DATE TO TDATE04I OF COTRN0AI
                   MOVE TRAN-DESC TO TDESC04I OF COTRN0AI
                   MOVE WS-TRAN-AMT  TO TAMT004I OF COTRN0AI
               WHEN 5
                   MOVE TRAN-ID    TO TRNID05I OF COTRN0AI
                   MOVE WS-TRAN-DATE TO TDATE05I OF COTRN0AI
                   MOVE TRAN-DESC TO TDESC05I OF COTRN0AI
                   MOVE WS-TRAN-AMT  TO TAMT005I OF COTRN0AI
               WHEN 6
                   MOVE TRAN-ID    TO TRNID06I OF COTRN0AI
                   MOVE WS-TRAN-DATE TO TDATE06I OF COTRN0AI
                   MOVE TRAN-DESC TO TDESC06I OF COTRN0AI
                   MOVE WS-TRAN-AMT  TO TAMT006I OF COTRN0AI
               WHEN 7
                   MOVE TRAN-ID    TO TRNID07I OF COTRN0AI
                   MOVE WS-TRAN-DATE TO TDATE07I OF COTRN0AI
                   MOVE TRAN-DESC TO TDESC07I OF COTRN0AI
                   MOVE WS-TRAN-AMT  TO TAMT007I OF COTRN0AI
               WHEN 8
                   MOVE TRAN-ID    TO TRNID08I OF COTRN0AI
                   MOVE WS-TRAN-DATE TO TDATE08I OF COTRN0AI
                   MOVE TRAN-DESC TO TDESC08I OF COTRN0AI
                   MOVE WS-TRAN-AMT  TO TAMT008I OF COTRN0AI
               WHEN 9
                   MOVE TRAN-ID    TO TRNID09I OF COTRN0AI
                   MOVE WS-TRAN-DATE TO TDATE09I OF COTRN0AI
                   MOVE TRAN-DESC TO TDESC09I OF COTRN0AI
                   MOVE WS-TRAN-AMT  TO TAMT009I OF COTRN0AI
               WHEN 10
                   MOVE TRAN-ID    TO TRNID10I OF COTRN0AI
                                         CDEMO-CT00-TRNID-LAST
                   MOVE WS-TRAN-DATE TO TDATE10I OF COTRN0AI
                   MOVE TRAN-DESC TO TDESC10I OF COTRN0AI
                   MOVE WS-TRAN-AMT  TO TAMT010I OF COTRN0AI
               WHEN OTHER
                   CONTINUE
           END-EVALUATE.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      INITIALIZE-TRAN-DATA
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.content:
INITIALIZE-ALL-FIELDS.

           MOVE -1              TO TRNIDINL OF COTRN1AI
           MOVE SPACES          TO TRNIDINI OF COTRN1AI
                                   TRNIDI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   CARDNUMI OF COTRN1AI
                                   TTYPCDI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TCATCDI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TRNSRCI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TRNAMTI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TDESCI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   TORIGDTI OF COTRN1AI
                                   TPROCDTI OF COTRN1AI
                                   MIDI     OF COTRN1AI
                                   MNAMEI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   MCITYI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   MZIPI    OF COTRN1AI
                                   WS-MESSAGE.

results.name: READ-TRANSACT-FILE
results.preamble:
File: COTRN01C.cbl
Program: COTRN01C - CICS COBOL Program - View a Transaction from TRANSACT file
Paragraph: READ-TRANSACT-FILE (lines 267-300)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COTRN01, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
Calls: PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
results.summary: paragraph READ-TRANSACT-FILE in COTRN01C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COTRN01, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN. comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
READ-TRANSACT-FILE.

           EXEC CICS READ
                DATASET   (WS-TRANSACT-FILE)
                INTO      (TRAN-RECORD)
                LENGTH    (LENGTH OF TRAN-RECORD)
                RIDFLD    (TRAN-ID)
                KEYLENGTH (LENGTH OF TRAN-ID)
                UPDATE
                RESP      (WS-RESP-CD)
                RESP2     (WS-REAS-CD)
           END-EXEC.

           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)
                   CONTINUE
               WHEN DFHRESP(NOTFND)
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Transaction ID NOT found...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO TRNIDINL OF COTRN1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   DISPLAY 'RESP:' WS-RESP-CD 'REAS:' WS-REAS-CD
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Unable to lookup Transaction...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO TRNIDINL OF COTRN1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: PROCESS-PF8-KEY
results.preamble:
File: COTRN00C.cbl
Program: COTRN00C - CICS COBOL Program - List Transactions from TRANSACT file
Paragraph: PROCESS-PF8-KEY (lines 257-278)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COTRN00, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
Calls: PERFORM PROCESS-PAGE-FORWARD, PERFORM SEND-TRNLST-SCREEN
results.summary: paragraph PROCESS-PF8-KEY in COTRN00C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COTRN00, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM PROCESS-PAGE-FORWARD, PERFORM SEND-TRNLST-SCREEN. comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
PROCESS-PF8-KEY.

           IF CDEMO-CT00-TRNID-LAST = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
               MOVE HIGH-VALUES TO TRAN-ID
           ELSE
               MOVE CDEMO-CT00-TRNID-LAST TO TRAN-ID
           END-IF

           MOVE -1       TO TRNIDINL OF COTRN0AI

           IF NEXT-PAGE-YES
               PERFORM PROCESS-PAGE-FORWARD
           ELSE
               MOVE 'You are already at the bottom of the page...' TO
                               WS-MESSAGE
               SET SEND-ERASE-NO TO TRUE
               PERFORM SEND-TRNLST-SCREEN
           END-IF.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      PROCESS-PAGE-FORWARD
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

                   MOVE SPACES TO TRNID01I OF COTRN0AI

                   MOVE SPACES TO TDESC01I OF COTRN0AI
                   MOVE SPACES TO TAMT001I OF COTRN0AI
